user_prompt: Which job boards do you support?
actual_output: I support parsing and application automation for major job boards and applicant tracking systems (ATS), including LinkedIn, Indeed, Greenhouse, Lever, and Workday. I can also process listings from other platforms if you provide the direct URL to the job posting. What is your current target role and industry so I can begin scanning these platforms for you?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly and accurately listed the job boards it supports as defined in its system prompt without triggering any unnecessary refusals.
